title: senecio mauritianus
intro: Senecio mauritianus, also known as the Mauritius ragwort or Mauritius groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio mauritianus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The herbal preparations of Senecio mauritianus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
